objectives.text: 掌握并列连词 and/but/or/so 的用法
了解并列句和复合句的区别

blocks.content: 并列连词连接两个**对等的**词、短语或句子：

rows: Hurry up, or you will be late.
It rained, so I stayed home.

blocks.content: 关联连词由两个部分组成，连接两个对等成分：

rows: Both Tom and Jerry are my friends.
Either you or he is wrong.
Neither she nor I like coffee.
Not only he but also I am a student.

blocks.title: 就近原则
blocks.content: either...or, neither...nor, not only...but also 连接的谓语动词要与**靠近它的主语**保持一致。例如：Neither you nor he is right.（动词与 he 一致，用 is）。
从属连词引导**从句**，从句不能独立成句，必须依附于主句：

rows: When I arrived, it was raining.
I stayed home because I was sick.
If it rains, we will stay home.
Although he is young, he is smart.

blocks.title: 区分要点
blocks.content: 并列连词连接两个对等成分（两个词/短语/句子）；从属连词连接主句和从句（从句不能独立存在）。

problem.content: I want to go to the party, ___ I have too much work to do.

solution.content: 前半句「我想去派对」和后半句「我有太多工作」是转折关系，应该用 but。答案选 B。

examples.title: 例2：关联连词的就近原则

problem.content: Either my parents or my brother ___ going to pick me up.

solution.content: either...or 连接时，谓语动词与靠近它的主语一致。靠近谓语的是 my brother（单数），所以用 is。答案选 A。

children.text: 引导从句，从句不能独立
